nasb.text: They said, “Arise, and let us go up against them; for we have seen the land, and behold, it is very good. And will you sit still? Do not delay to go, to enter, to possess the land.

esv.text: They said, “Arise, and let us go up against them, for we have seen the land, and behold, it is very good. And will you do nothing? Do not be slow to go, to enter in and possess the land.

cnv.text: 他們回答：“起來，我們上去攻擊他們吧。因為我們已經看過那地，見那地十分美好，你們還靜坐不動嗎？不可再遲延，要趕快去取得那地。

ccb.text: 他们回答说：“我们前去攻取那地方吧！我们已经打探清楚了，那地方非常好。你们还等什么？要赶快去占领那地方。
